title: Activity Log Events API
excerpt: Is there a list of all possible events for the activity log api endpoint?

posts.author: taskmngmt (Lea)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a list of all possible events for the activity log api endpoint?

posts.author: rory586 (rory)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
It’s unlikely there’s a single, exhaustive list of all possible activity log events for the API endpoint you’re using. Here’s why:

  • Many Events, Many Sources: Activity logs can track a vast number of actions depending on the system or application.
  • Constant Change: New features and functionalities can introduce new events over time.

However, there are still ways to find the events you need:

  1. API Documentation: Check the API documentation for the specific endpoint you’re using. It might list common events or explain how to filter by event type or category.
  2. Search Functionality: Some APIs allow searching activity logs by keywords or filtering by event types. Look for such functionalities within the API itself.
  3. Sample Responses: The documentation might provide sample responses that show the structure of event data, including the event type or name.

If you’re stuck, consider contacting the API provider’s support for assistance. They might be able to provide a more comprehensive overview of the events captured in the activity log.
